# Sample Candidate Profile

## Education

Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence with coursework in machine learning, natural language processing, information retrieval, and software engineering.

## AI Course Project

Built a Python API development project using FastAPI to expose an evidence-grounded career analysis workflow. The project included document chunking, fake embeddings, retrieval, structured job requirement extraction, match scoring, and grounding evaluation.

## Skills

Python, FastAPI, Pydantic, TypeScript, React, Next.js, retrieval augmented generation, vector search, testing, and API design.

## GitHub Project

Created a GitHub portfolio project that demonstrates a LangGraph-style workflow for parsing candidate materials, retrieving evidence, generating resume bullets, and flagging unsupported claims with evaluator warnings.
